message:
test(e2e): add comprehensive allow-once flow E2E tests

Implements 10 new E2E tests for the allow-once exception flow:
- block_emits_code_and_allow_once_allows: Full block → code → allow path
- block_emits_full_hash_in_hook_output: Verify hash in hook JSON
- cwd_scoping_blocks_same_command_in_different_directory: CWD isolation
- single_use_consumed_after_first_allow: --single-use flag behavior
- allow_once_list_shows_pending_and_active_entries: List command
- force_flag_required_for_config_block_override: --force requirement
- collision_handling_with_multiple_pending_entries: Unique codes
- revoke_removes_active_exception: Revoke command
- dry_run_does_not_create_exception: --dry-run flag
- json_output_mode_works: --json output format

Closes git_safety_guard-oien.1.7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
